passive.name: Inherent Glamour
passive.description: Neeko can look like an ally champion or as other units on the map. Receiving immobilizing crowd control, casting damaging spells, damaging enemy towers as a non-champion, or your disguise taking damage equal to its healthbar breaks the disguise.

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Neeko''' has a collection of disguises to take on the appearance of allied champions. She can choose a new champion to switch her disguise or select herself to deactivate her disguise, placing ''Inherent Glamour'' on a {{fd|0.5}}-second cooldown. Taking damage from a {{tip|champion}} or {{tip|turret}} puts ''Inherent Glamour'' on a 2-second cooldown.
wiki_detail.description3: While disguised, '''Neeko''' can use basic attacks while keeping her form. Her disguise breaks if her form takes lethal damage or if she becomes {{tip|immobilize|immobilized}}, deals damage to a [[structure]] with a non-champion form, or uses a damaging [[champion ability|ability]], [[summoner spell]], or [[active ability items|item active]].
wiki_detail.description4: ''Inherent Glamour's disguise is not deactivated from {{ai|Pop Blossom|Neeko}} until after {{fd|0.5}} seconds of its cast. '''Neeko''' cannot activate Inherent Glamour while she is unable to cast abilities.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Neeko''' can store up the ''Sho'Ma'' of multiple units at a time.
* ''Inherent Glamour's'' cooldown only prevents '''Neeko''' from activating disguises; she can still store and remove ''Sho'Ma'' while the passive is on cooldown.
* If '''Neeko''' attempts to activate a disguise while near and for the trap, ward, or jungle plant she stored ''Sho'Ma'' for, she will leap to that unit's exact position over 1 second and then become disguised. If she does so for a monster and is near its respective jungle camp, she will leap to that monster's usual position in the camp.
** She will fail to activate the disguise after the leap if she is affected by the same conditions that would break a disguise.
* '''Neeko''' will copy aesthetics as well as superficial mechanical [[Champion statistic|statistics]]. She will fake a number of readings:
** [[Health|Health bar]] (original's current amount becomes her apparent maximum)
** [[Manaless|Secondary resource]] - e.g. {{as|mana}}, {{as|energy}} or none at all (original's current amount becomes her apparent maximum)
** [[Champion statistic|Stats]]
** [[Buff|Buffs]] and [[Debuff|debuffs]] with their respective icons and VFX/SFX (there are exceptions)
*** '''Neeko''' sees the buffs that are actually applied to her, while enemies see the disguised champion's buffs.
** Kill feed icon
* A number of attributes she actually adopts are:
** Base movement speed
** The melee or ranged classification of the champion
** Base attack speed and attack ratio
** The projectile or non-projectile quality of their attack
** Attack range (adopt the new form [[Range|attack range]])
** [[Size]] (including size modifiers and base champion size)
** Default transformation toggle (non-innate)
** Voice lines
** Character interactions (jokes, taunts, dances, laughs, toggle effects), as well as their {{si|Recall}} animation
*** '''Neeko''' can copy {{cis|Samira}} taunt animation but she will not actually throw the coin via the {{ai|Taunt|Samira|image = Samira splash coin.png}} ability.
* ''Inherent Glamour's'' disguise is broken by the following spell casts:
** Casting {{ai|Q|Neeko}} or {{ai|E|Neeko}}.
*** Casting {{ai|R|Neeko}} will not break the disguise immediately, but after a delay.
** Using {{si|Exhaust}}, {{si|Ignite}}, or {{si|Smite}}.
** Activating {{ii|Hextech Rocketbelt}}, {{ii|Stridebreaker}}, or {{ii|Redemption}}.
* The scoreboard's question mark of '''Neeko''' (which indicates an enemy is not currently visible to your team) will disappear, if the {{ai|Inherent Glamour|Neeko|disguised}} '''Neeko''' is visible. Therefore, it can be used to determine, whether a unit is '''Neeko''' or not.
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{ci|Neeko}} has a collection of disguises to take on the appearance of allied champions. She can choose a new champion to switch her disguise or select herself to deactivate her disguise. Standing near a non-champion unit will collect its ''Sho'Ma'', adding its disguise to the collection. She can collect only one ''Sho'Ma'', but can discard or consume it.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The disguise will break when '''Neeko''' takes "lethal" damage, becomes {{tip|immobilized}}, or performs her damaging abilities. This will also incur the cooldown.

Q.name: Blooming Burst
Q.description: Neeko throws a seed dealing magic damage. The seed blooms again on hitting champions or killing units.
Q.tooltip: Neeko throws a seed that blooms to deal {{ explosiondamage }} magic damage. If it kills a unit or hits a champion or large monster, it will bloom again, dealing {{ seconddamage }} magic damage. Max 2 extra blooms.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Neeko''' tosses a seed that ''blooms'' at the target location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies.
wiki_detail.description2: If the ''bloom'' kills an enemy or hits a {{tip|champion}} or large {{tip|monster}}, it will ''bloom'' again after {{fd|0.75}} seconds to deal {{as|magic damage}}. This may occur up to 2 times per cast.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|35 to 135}} {{as|(+ 25% AP)}}|Total Maximum Magic Damage|{{ap|80+35*2 to 260+135*2}} {{as|(+ 100% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: Each bloom deals {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} against {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Blooming Burst will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.parry:
|notes        = 
* {{tip|Spell shield}} blocks an instance of damage but does not prevent subsequent ''Blooms''.
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Neeko}} tosses a seed that ''blooms'' at the target location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If the ''bloom'' kills an enemy or hits a {{tip|champion}} or large {{tip|monster}}, it will ''bloom'' again to deal {{as|magic damage}}, up to two times per cast.

W.name: Shapesplitter
W.description: Neeko passively deals bonus magic damage every third attack, briefly increasing her move speed. Neeko can activate to send a clone in a direction and recast to change the direction of the clone.
W.tooltip:
Passive: Every 3rd Attack deals an additional {{ passivebonusdamagecalc }} bonus magic damage and increases Neeko's Move Speed by {{ passivehaste }}% for {{ passivehasteduration }} second.

Active: Neeko becomes invisible for {{ stealthduration }} seconds and projects a clone that lasts {{ cloneduration }} seconds. Neeko and the clone gain {{ haste }}% Move Speed for {{ hasteduration }} seconds. 

The clone can be controlled using the Move Pet Click hotkey or by Recasting this Ability.
The clone mirrors her spellcasts, emotes, and recall.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Neeko's''' basic attacks {{tip|on-hit}} generate a [[stack]] of ''Shapesplitter'',  which refreshes on subsequent attacks and stacks up to 2 times. At 2 stacks, her next basic attack {{tip|on-attack}} consumes them all to become {{tip|projectile|non-projectile}}, deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} and grant her {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for 1 second. This attack deals {{as|75 '''bonus''' magic damage}} against {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Bonus Magic Damage|{{ap|40 to 180}} {{as|(+ 60% AP)}}}}
{{st|Bonus Movement Speed|{{ap|10 to 40}}%}}
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Neeko''' creates a {{tip|clone}} of her {{ai|Inherent Glamour|Neeko|current form}}, after which they both instantly become {{tip|invisible}} for {{fd|0.5}} seconds and gain {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}} for 3 seconds. ''Shapesplitter'' can be recast at any time while the clone is active.
wiki_detail.description3:
The clone lasts for 3 seconds, starts running a fixed distance in the target direction, and is {{tip|untargetable}} to allies and for the first {{fd|0.5}} seconds of its lifespan to enemies.

Additionally, the clone plays the animations for ''{{ai|Blooming Burst|Neeko}}'' and ''{{ai|Tangle-Barbs|Neeko}}'' whenever '''Neeko''' casts them. She can also command the clone once to play the animation of her next [[Emoting|emote]] or {{si|Recall}} for a {{tt|set duration|See notes}} that overrides its original duration.
wiki_detail.description4: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Neeko''' sends her clone to the target location if it is not playing an emote or {{si|Recall}} animation.
wiki_detail.notes:
* When '''Neeko''' forces her clone to play an emote or {{si|Recall}} animation, she modifies its duration based on the animation played.
** Joke - 8 seconds.
** Dance - 8 seconds.
** Taunt - {{fd|4.25}} seconds.
** Laugh - 3 seconds.
** Toggle - Plays the Joke emote but for the clone only.
** {{si|Recall}} - 8 seconds.
** {{si|Empowered Recall}} - 4 seconds.
* Both '''Neeko''' and the clone use the same running animation.
* The clone can still be targeted by allied {{tip|auto-targeted}} effects (e.g. {{si|Heal}}, {{ai|Celestial Blessing|Kayle}}).
* The empowered attack will not trigger against [[ward]]s and [[jungle plants]].
* Using a basic attack breaks the stealth at the start of the attack windup.
wiki_detail.flavorsound: {{sm2|Neeko_Original_W_CloneDestroyed_6.ogg}} (Clone is destroyed) "Hahaa! You fell for it!"
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{cis|Neeko}} basic attacks generate stacks of ''Shapesplitter''. At 2 stacks, her next basic attack will consume them all to become {{tip|projectile|non-projectile}}, deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}, and briefly grant her {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' move speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Neeko''' creates a {{tip|clone}} of her {{ai|Inherent Glamour|Neeko|current form}}, together they enter brief {{tip|invisibility}} and gain {{as|'''bonus''' move speed}} for a short time. The clone will run in the target direction for a short time before expiring, during which ''Shapesplitter'' can be recast.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Neeko''' directs the clone to the target location.

E.name: Tangle-Barbs
E.description: Neeko slings a tangle that damages and roots everything it passes through. If the tangle kills an enemy or passes through a champion, it becomes larger, faster, and roots for longer.
E.tooltip:
Neeko slings a tangle that deals {{ basedamage }} magic damage and Roots for {{ minrootduration }} seconds.

The tangle becomes empowered after hitting an enemy, growing larger, moving faster, and Rooting for {{ maxrootduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Neeko''' slings a magical spiral in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|root|roots}} them for a duration.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|70 to 210}} {{as|(+ 65% AP)}}}}
{{st|Root Duration|{{ap|0.7 to 1.5}} seconds}}
wiki_detail.description2: If the spiral hits at least one enemy, it grows in size and its speed and root duration is increased.
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Neeko}} slings a magical spiral in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|root|roots}} enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If the spiral hits at least one enemy, it grows in size, speed, and root duration.

R.name: Pop Blossom
R.description: After a short preparation, Neeko leaps into the air, knocking up all nearby enemies. Upon landing, nearby enemies are damaged and stunned. The preparation is hidden if Neeko is disguised.
R.tooltip:
After a delay Neeko leaps into the air, Knocking Up all nearby enemies for {{ delayuntilexplosion }} seconds. She then crashes down, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage to all nearby enemies and Stunning them for {{ stunduration }} seconds.

This Ability can be prepared in secret if Neeko is disguised. {{ delaybeforepassiveremoval }} seconds after casting this ability Neeko breaks her disguise.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Neeko''' winds up spiritual essence over {{fd|1.25}} seconds and highlights an area around herself, which is visible to enemies unless she is ''{{ai|Inherent Glamour|Neeko|disguised}}''. If '''Neeko''' is in a ''{{ai|Inherent Glamour|Neeko|disguise}}'', it will break after {{fd|0.5}} seconds into the duration.
wiki_detail.description2: After winding up, the cast time begins and '''Neeko''' leaps upward, {{tip|airborne|knocking up}} nearby enemies for {{fd|0.6}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: When the cast time ends, she lands to emit a burst of energy that deals {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and {{tip|stun|stuns}} them for {{fd|0.75}} seconds.
wiki_detail.parry:
|notes        = 
'''Ability details:'''
* The wind up uses a special bar similar to cast bars to represent when ''Pop Blossom's'' cast time will start.
** The wind up has no special interactions.
* The highlighted area is fixed around '''Neeko'''.
* '''Neeko's''' most recent {{ai|Shapesplitter|Neeko}} clone disappears when ''Pop Blossom's'' cast time starts.
{{Effect at cast time end}}
'''Interactions:'''
* On-cast effects are applied on activation.
* ''Pop Blossom'' can start its cast time during {{tip|stasis (buff)|stasis}}.
{{ct|cast|move=false|cast=false|attack=false|items=false|consume=false|spells=true,false,false,false,false|interrupts=revival-false}}
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Neeko}} briefly winds up spiritual essence and highlights the area around her, which is visible to enemies unless she is {{ai|Inherent Glamour|Neeko|disguised}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Afterwards, '''Neeko''' briefly leaps upward and {{tip|airborne|knocks up}} nearby enemies. She then lands to emit a burst of energy that deals {{as|magic damage}} and briefly {{tip|stun|stuns}} nearby enemies.
